acceptanceCovered: Sunner search box ('Tim kiem profile Sunner') is present and visible next to the compose entry bar

Kudos card content renders as real HTML (no literal

or

substrings visible in rendered text)
Highlight carousel peek cards are proportionally scaled from the active card, not reflow-drifted to a different natural height
Page body background is the fixed dark theme (#00101a), not dependent on prefers-color-scheme
Banner container height matches its background asset's natural aspect ratio (1440x512) instead of collapsing to ~158px
Spotlight board canvas has a decorative background image instead of a bare solid color
regressionChecked: Sanitizer XSS surface: ran 11 empirical jsdom probes (script tags, onerror/onclick/style attrs, javascript:/tab-obfuscated-javascript:/data: hrefs, foreign <svg onload>) against sanitizeKudosContentHtml via a throwaway vitest file (deleted after run) — all blocked, all pass

Sanitizer allowlist vs. toolbar/mention completeness: cross-checked kudos-editor-toolbar.tsx (bold/italic/strike/orderedList/quote/link) and mention-suggestion.tsx (span.kudos-mention) against ALLOWED_TAGS — full parity; only gap is H1-H6/HR (StarterKit markdown-shortcut-reachable, no toolbar button) which get unwrapped (text kept, styling lost) — cosmetic, not security

Carousel fixed w-[640px] restructure: walked the flex-centering math for the actual 1280px Playwright default viewport and HighlightCarousel's own unpadded max-w-[1440px] wrapper — active card stays fully visible (needs available width >= 640px, well within page's own supported range); confirmed pointer-events-none + aria-hidden preserved on both peek wrappers

globals.css hardcode blast radius: grepped app/login, components/layout/* for any light-mode/white-background assumption — none found, every component already used --details-* dark tokens unconditionally

e2e selector-scope fixes: traced each collision to a real, distinct new element (ComposeEntryBar's own 'gui...' substring, SunnerSearchBar's role=combobox, KudosFilters' 'Hashtag' button) rather than an accidental duplicate accessible name — legitimate scope fixes, not masked a11y regressions
RPC read paths in lib/kudos/queries.ts (get_highlight_kudos/get_kudos_feed/get_spotlight_nodes/etc.): all parameterized via supabase.rpc(), no string concatenation
